title: ERP5 MCP Server - Instance Parameters
description: Configuration parameters for deploying an ERP5 MCP server via SlapOS.

mcp-port.title: MCP External Port
mcp-port.description: Port on which HAProxy exposes the MCP server (IPv6).

mcp-internal-port.title: MCP Internal Port
mcp-internal-port.description: Port on which the MCP server listens internally (behind HAProxy).

erp5-url.title: ERP5 Instance URL
erp5-url.description: Base URL of the ERP5 instance to connect to (e.g. https://erp5.example.com).

erp5-ac-cookie.title: ERP5 __ac Cookie
erp5-ac-cookie.description: Value of the __ac authentication cookie for ERP5 (used in stdio mode).

mcp-transport.title: MCP Transport
mcp-transport.description: Transport protocol: streamable-http for remote access, stdio for local.

mcp-server-url.title: MCP Server Public URL
mcp-server-url.description: Public HTTPS URL of the MCP server for OAuth callbacks (required for streamable-http transport). Defaults to internal address if not set.

mcp-log-level.title: Log Level
mcp-log-level.description: Python logging level for the MCP server.

logrotate-num.title: Log Retention (days)
logrotate-num.description: Number of rotated log files to keep.
